title: SmoothHud
description: animate the selected hotbar slot highlight when switching slots
body:
## SmoothHud
simple fabric mod which animates the selected hotbar slot highlight when switching slots.

### preview:
![animated hotbar slot switching](https://cdn.79183.org/animated_hotbar.gif)

### notice:
i've made a [new github account](https://github.com/treegfx2), since i lost access to my old one (@treegfx).
<details> <summary>full story</summary>
  
my old github account (@treegfx) was hacked around ~ 2 weeks ago. i haven't gotten a response on my support ticket since. 

- **how did this happen?** i made the mistake of authenticating with my account from the github cli on a virtual machine i used for testing software, including known viruses. **no other accounts are compromised.**


- i am still logged in from the github cli on my main machine, which i've now used to private all my repositories, including a newly created malicious executable.


- **don't trust any new code or repositories from this old account!** there is a reason why i haven't linked it, but only shared the username


i made a [new github account](https://github.com/treegfx2) to combat this, which is where i'll soon share new projects.
</details>
